subject: Re:
body:
Will give that a try. Bill Gates would carry more of a punch:) Saw Mnuchin/Cohn in DC -- they are talking a big game but I don't know if they can deliver on tax reform. What do you think? I don't know why Trump does not reach out to Schumer -- two outer borough guys who know each other and can talk to each other. He has to move away from the right wing nutters back to the middle which is his natural space anyway.

--
Landon Thomas, Jr.
Financial Reporter
New York Times
██████████████████████
http://topics.nytimes.com/top/reference/timestopics/people/t/landon_jr_thomas/index.html

subject: Re:
body:
nathan myrhvold. suggested you use him as a refrence for masa. on another note. lots of investigations going slow as no one to lead , but when the justice dept staff gets filled. OY.
